The science

Tested. Dosed.
Nothing hidden.

“Natural” is not a safety standard. A lab result is. Every harvest is verified for potency and purity before it becomes a product, and the numbers are yours to read.

  • ◔ Third-party certificate of analysis, per batch
  • ≋ Potency and dose confirmed to the milligram
  • ❧ Sourcing and handling documented end to end
